name: playwright_advanced
description: Last Version of Playwright supporting nodejs 16 @playwright/test@1.40.1 Install full Playwright package with browser binaries npm init playwright@1.40.1

scripts.test1: BROWSER_PATH='/Applications/Google Chrome.app/Contents/MacOS/Google Chrome' npx playwright test tests-customlauncher/example.spec.js --project=chromium --headed
scripts.setuptest: BROWSER_PATH='/Applications/Google Chrome.app/Contents/MacOS/Google Chrome' npx playwright test tests-customlauncher/setuptests/example2.spec.js --project=chromium --headed
